title: ProtocolLab Contract Coverage Verification
scope: Verify that public ProtocolLab contract areas have canonical SpecTrace requirements, schemas where applicable, fixture coverage where useful, and traceability links.
verification_method: Repository inspection, coverage matrix review, JSON parse checks, fixture inventory, traceability-link review, and forbidden source/script file scan.
preconditions: The public repository remains spec-only and language-neutral.
No public scripts, generated validators, SDKs, runner code, or build automation are required for verification.
procedure: Inventory SpecTrace JSON artifacts under specs/requirements, specs/architecture, specs/work-items, and specs/verification.
Confirm major JSON contract documents have schemas under schemas/ or a documented reason for omission.
Confirm valid and invalid fixture examples exist for major top-level contracts where useful.
Confirm measurement, telemetry, artifact, redaction, and comparability schemas and fixtures are present.
Confirm specs/traceability/trace-links.json links requirements to schemas and fixtures.
Scan for source code, scripts, workflows, and implementation-specific repository folders.
expected_result: The repository presents ProtocolLab as a complete public contract surface with traceable requirements, schemas, fixtures, and audit documentation, without depending on a specific runner, implementation language, telemetry backend, or hosted lab.
